topic: javascript basics variables functions loops conditionals

criteria.name: Correct file naming (index.js / app.js, lowercase, no spaces)
Proper folder structure (src/, assets/ if needed)
Use of let/const instead of var
Correct use of loops (for/while) without infinite loops
Program runs without errors and produces correct output

topic: dom manipulation events html css javascript frontend

criteria.name: Correct file naming and folder structure (index.html, style.css, app.js)
Event listeners used correctly (addEventListener, no inline onclick)
Functions are modular and named clearly
Error handling for empty inputs / edge cases
Project works as expected end to end
